test-case.description: creates a new reusable setting when none exist
test-case.name: Invoke-AddIntuneReusableSetting.creates a new reusable setting when none exist

test-case.description: returns OK and does not post when the setting is already compliant
test-case.name: Invoke-AddIntuneReusableSetting.returns OK and does not post when the setting is already compliant

test-case.description: returns BadRequest when tenantFilter is missing
test-case.name: Invoke-AddIntuneReusableSetting.returns BadRequest when tenantFilter is missing

test-case.description: creates a reusable setting template with stored metadata
test-case.name: Invoke-AddIntuneReusableSettingTemplate.creates a reusable setting template with stored metadata

test-case.description: returns InternalServerError when raw JSON is invalid
test-case.name: Invoke-AddIntuneReusableSettingTemplate.returns InternalServerError when raw JSON is invalid

test-case.description: normalizes children null values in reusable setting templates
test-case.name: Invoke-AddIntuneReusableSettingTemplate.normalizes children null values in reusable setting templates

test-case.description: returns reusable settings with raw JSON when tenantFilter is provided
test-case.name: Invoke-ListIntuneReusableSettings.returns reusable settings with raw JSON when tenantFilter is provided

test-case.description: requests a specific setting when ID is provided
test-case.name: Invoke-ListIntuneReusableSettings.requests a specific setting when ID is provided

test-case.description: returns BadRequest when tenantFilter is missing
test-case.name: Invoke-ListIntuneReusableSettings.returns BadRequest when tenantFilter is missing

test-case.description: returns sorted templates with parsed metadata and sync flag
test-case.name: Invoke-ListIntuneReusableSettingTemplates.returns sorted templates with parsed metadata and sync flag

test-case.description: filters by ID when provided
test-case.name: Invoke-ListIntuneReusableSettingTemplates.filters by ID when provided

test-case.description: deletes a reusable setting when tenant and ID are provided
test-case.name: Invoke-RemoveIntuneReusableSetting.deletes a reusable setting when tenant and ID are provided

test-case.description: returns BadRequest when tenantFilter is missing
test-case.name: Invoke-RemoveIntuneReusableSetting.returns BadRequest when tenantFilter is missing

test-case.description: returns BadRequest when ID is missing
test-case.name: Invoke-RemoveIntuneReusableSetting.returns BadRequest when ID is missing

test-case.description: removes a reusable setting template when ID is provided
test-case.name: Invoke-RemoveIntuneReusableSettingTemplate.removes a reusable setting template when ID is provided

test-case.description: returns InternalServerError when ID is missing
test-case.name: Invoke-RemoveIntuneReusableSettingTemplate.returns InternalServerError when ID is missing

test-case.description: sets compare fields and exits when license requirement fails
test-case.name: Invoke-CIPPStandardReusableSettingsTemplate.sets compare fields and exits when license requirement fails

test-case.description: creates missing reusable settings when remediate is enabled
test-case.name: Invoke-CIPPStandardReusableSettingsTemplate.creates missing reusable settings when remediate is enabled

test-case.description: updates existing reusable settings when a mismatch is found
test-case.name: Invoke-CIPPStandardReusableSettingsTemplate.updates existing reusable settings when a mismatch is found

test-case.description: writes standards alerts when alerting is enabled and drift exists
test-case.name: Invoke-CIPPStandardReusableSettingsTemplate.writes standards alerts when alerting is enabled and drift exists

test-case.description: logs compliance and reports true when no differences are found
test-case.name: Invoke-CIPPStandardReusableSettingsTemplate.logs compliance and reports true when no differences are found

test-case.description: emits per-admin alerts when AlertEachAdmin is true
test-case.name: Get-CIPPAlertGlobalAdminAllowList.emits per-admin alerts when AlertEachAdmin is true

test-case.description: emits single aggregated alert when AlertEachAdmin is false (default)
test-case.name: Get-CIPPAlertGlobalAdminAllowList.emits single aggregated alert when AlertEachAdmin is false (default)

test-case.description: emits single aggregated alert when AlertEachAdmin is explicitly false via input object
test-case.name: Get-CIPPAlertGlobalAdminAllowList.emits single aggregated alert when AlertEachAdmin is explicitly false via input object

test-case.description: suppresses alert when UPN prefix is approved (comma separated list)
test-case.name: Get-CIPPAlertGlobalAdminAllowList.suppresses alert when UPN prefix is approved (comma separated list)

test-case.description: accepts ApprovedGlobalAdmins property when provided as hashtable
test-case.name: Get-CIPPAlertGlobalAdminAllowList.accepts ApprovedGlobalAdmins property when provided as hashtable

test-case.description: writes alert message when Graph call fails
test-case.name: Get-CIPPAlertGlobalAdminAllowList.writes alert message when Graph call fails

failure.message: CommandNotFoundException: The term 'Get-CippException' is not recognized as a name of a cmdlet, function, script file, or executable program. Check the spelling of the name, or if a path was included, verify that the path is correct and try again.

test-case.description: defaults to aggregated alerting with all mechanisms and statuses
test-case.name: Get-CIPPAlertIntunePolicyConflicts.defaults to aggregated alerting with all mechanisms and statuses

test-case.description: emits per-issue alerts when AlertEachIssue is true
test-case.name: Get-CIPPAlertIntunePolicyConflicts.emits per-issue alerts when AlertEachIssue is true

test-case.description: supports legacy Aggregate=false for per-issue alerts
test-case.name: Get-CIPPAlertIntunePolicyConflicts.supports legacy Aggregate=false for per-issue alerts

test-case.description: honors IncludePolicies toggle
test-case.name: Get-CIPPAlertIntunePolicyConflicts.honors IncludePolicies toggle

test-case.description: suppresses conflict-only alerts when AlertConflicts is false
test-case.name: Get-CIPPAlertIntunePolicyConflicts.suppresses conflict-only alerts when AlertConflicts is false

test-case.description: skips processing when license check fails
test-case.name: Get-CIPPAlertIntunePolicyConflicts.skips processing when license check fails

test-case.description: writes alert message when Graph call fails
test-case.name: Get-CIPPAlertIntunePolicyConflicts.writes alert message when Graph call fails

failure.message: CommandNotFoundException: The term 'Get-CippException' is not recognized as a name of a cmdlet, function, script file, or executable program. Check the spelling of the name, or if a path was included, verify that the path is correct and try again.
